unit: 📖 Unit 6: Systems of Linear Equations and Inequalities
topic: Systems of Linear Inequalities by Graphing
learning_objectives: Students will be able to graph multiple inequalities on the same coordinate plane.
Students will be able to identify overlapping solution regions.
Students will be able to interpret feasible regions.

questions.question: A music festival has two stages. The $x$-axis represents the frequency of the music, and the $y$-axis represents the volume. If the first stage operates within the region defined by $x \geq 20$ and $y \leq 50$, which of the following points is within the feasible region?
An artist is creating a canvas with a size defined by the system of inequalities $x + y \leq 12$ and $x - y \geq -4$. What is the area of the feasible region?
A rhythm pattern is defined by the inequalities $x \geq 10$ and $y \leq 20 - x$. Which of the following points satisfies both inequalities?
A sound wave has a frequency defined by the inequality $y \geq 2x - 5$. If the volume is defined by the inequality $y \leq -x + 10$, which of the following points is within the overlapping region?

A painter is mixing colors on a palette. The amount of red paint is defined by $x \geq 5$, and the amount of blue paint is defined by $y \leq 15 - x$. Which of the following points is within the feasible region?
A music producer is working on a new track. The tempo is defined by $x \geq 100$, and the duration is defined by $y \leq 200 - x$. Which of the following points satisfies both inequalities?
A musician is playing a melody on a $4$-string instrument. The notes are defined by the system of inequalities $x + y \leq 8$ and $x - y \geq -2$. What is the area of the feasible region?

A light designer is creating a lighting scheme for a concert. The intensity of the lights is defined by $y \geq x - 3$, and the color temperature is defined by $y \leq -x + 12$. Which of the following points is within the overlapping region?

Graph the system of inequalities $x + y \leq 10$ and $x - y \geq -2$ on the same coordinate plane. Identify the overlapping solution region and interpret the feasible region in the context of a music festival.

A sound engineer is working on a live performance. The sound levels are defined by the system of inequalities $y \geq 2x - 5$ and $y \leq -x + 15$. Graph the system of inequalities and identify the overlapping solution region. Interpret the feasible region in the context of the live performance.

teacher_rules: Tip 1: Ensure students understand the concept of feasible regions and how to graph multiple inequalities on the same coordinate plane.
Tip 2: Emphasize the importance of identifying overlapping solution regions and interpreting the feasible region in the context of the problem.
Tip 3: Encourage students to use real-world examples, such as music festivals or live performances, to illustrate their understanding of the concepts.
